title: tetrosyl limited Bartoline Low Odour White Spirit 750ml – Premium Solvent for Paint Thinning & Brush Cleaning
features: LOW ODOUR FORMULA: Specially refined to provide a milder scent, making it ideal for indoor use and confined spaces without strong fumes.
POWERFUL PAINT THINNER & CLEANER: Effectively thins solvent-based and oil-based paints for smooth application while maintaining paint performance.
CLEANS BRUSHES & TOOLS: Quickly removes paint residue from brushes, rollers, and tools, extending their lifespan and keeping them in top condition.
IDEAL FOR PAINT SPILLS & SURFACES: Easily wipes away accidental paint spills and splashes without damaging surfaces, making cleanup hassle-free.
HIGH-QUALITY & VERSATILE: Meets BS245 Type A standards, ensuring professional-grade performance for both DIY and professional painting projects.
description: It contains only virgin raw materials and is not manufactured from inferior recovered or reclaimed materials.
